patch.value: Functional testing with real pm data + production hardening. Verified standup composes a real report from live pm context, --dry-run prevents POST, empty workspace handled, real-post failure exits non-zero.

value.author: codex-audit
value.text: 2026-05-29 hands-on standup note: exercised built pm-slack-standup without real Slack secrets using a temporary pm tracker. Missing webhook in non-dry-run mode returned a clear non-zero error; dry-run with channel #audit, includeDone true, and text format generated sections for In Progress, Blocked, Done Today, and Up Next with counts 1 each and did not post; mocked HTTPS post with fake webhook produced posted true and contained the generated standup payload. No real customer payloads or secret values were used or printed.
